title: Events | Abena Oppong-Asare MP
headings: h2: Sign up for a Coffee Morning with Abena
h2: Book a virtual surgery with Abena
h3: Here for Erith and Thamesmead
text_excerpt: Events | Abena Oppong-Asare MP Facebook Twitter Mail Instagram Youtube Home About Abena Latest news Monthly Newsletters In Parliament Maiden Speech Thamesmead’s Pride in Place Survey Campaign Summer School 2026 In the community Southeastern Campaign Cost of Living Help Next Stop Thamesmead Events Sign up to a ‘Meet your MP’ Coffee Morning with Abena Annual Christmas Card Competition Get in touch Search Sign up for a Coffee Morning with Abena If you are a resident of Erith and Thamesmead and would like to join Abena for a ‘Meet your MP’ Coffee Morning then sign up here Sign Up Book a virtual surgery with Abena If you are a resident of Erith and Thamesmead and need assistance with an issue you can book a meeting with me by email Book a virtual surgery Virtual surgeries If you are a constituent of Erith and Thamesmead and would like to speak to me about a specific issue you are in need of assistance with you can book a virtual advice surgery appointment. My office has been experiencing an extremely high volume of casework relating to Covid-19 so I will be prioritising urgent cases. Please email me at abena.oppongasare.mp@parliament.uk to request a virtual advice surgery appointment. Please include your name, address and, details of the issue you require assistance about. To check if you are a constituent you can search your postcode here: https://www.theyworkforyou.com/ Ask Abena If you have a question relating to policy or a general issue around the constituency you can ask your questions live during one of my live Facebook Q and A events. You can find my first Facebook live here: https://www.facebook.com/AbenaOppongAsareMP/videos/701012944059816/ Details of upcoming events will be posted here and on social media, so keep an eye out. Share this entry Share on Facebook Share on Twitter Share by Mail Here for Erith and Thamesmead Through my work I am determined to work with local residents, community groups, businesses and public services to ensure that Erith and Thamesmead is put on the map and we get a fair deal for our community.
